sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (
select -- ap.* 
ap.AppointmentId
,ap.AppointmentTypeId
,ap.AppointmentDescription
,ap.StaffId
,ap.ClientId
,ap.OccurrenceTypeId
,ap.OccurrenceFrequency
,ap.FrequencyInterval
,ap.StartDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.StartTime
,ap.EndTime
,ap.DayTypes
,ap.MonthDay
,ap.ScheduledById
,ap.ScheduledOn
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.ClientVerificationDate
,ap.StaffVerificationDate
,ap.CancellationTypeId
,ap.CancellationNote
,ap.RescheduleDueDate
,ap.RescheduleAssignedToId
,ap.SessionNoteResponseId
,ap.SessionNoteFormId
,ap.ServiceId
,ap.PaycodeId
,ap.FunderId
,ap.ProcedureCodeId
,ap.LocationId
,ap.AddressId
,ap.ClientSignatureId
,ap.StaffSignatureId
,ap.AssociatedAppointmentId
,ap.DiagnosisId
,ap.SessionNoteReviewedOn
,ap.StartingAddressId
,ap.EndingAddressId
,ap.SessionNoteReviewedBy
,ap.SeriesAppointmentId
,ap.OccurrenceEndDate
,ap.ActualStartTime
,ap.ActualEndTime
,ap.SignatureParentName
,ap.SignatureParentRelationship
,ap.FromLocationId
,ap.FromLocation
,ap.ToLocationId
,ap.ToLocation
,ap.Mileage
,ap.ActivityTagId
,ap.CancellationTagId
,ap.CopaymentMethodId
,ap.CopaymentReferenceNumber
,ap.CopaymentAmountCollected
,ap.ProviderServiceId
,ap.RescheduleFromId
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeCredentialId
,ap.hcPropagatingAccountInfoId
,ap.hcPropagatingProviderServiceId
,ap.hcPropagatingStaffMemberId
,ap.hcPropagatingChildProfileId
,ap.hcPropagatingChildProfileAuthorizationId
,ap.hcPropagatingFunderId
,ap.hcPropagatingChildProfileFunderId
,ap.hcPropagatingProviderBillingCodeId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.SeriesAppointmentStartDate
,ap.MonthTypeId
,ap.MonthOccurrenceDayId
,ap.MonthOccurrenceTypeId
,ap.DateBillingReported
,ap.VerifiedById
,ap.Notes
,ap.ProcedureCodeIdPreviousReference
,ap.SessionNoteDraftFormId
,ap.SessionNoteDraftResponseId
,ap.SessionNoteDraftOn
,ap.SessionNoteDraftStaffMemberId
,ap.KareoEncounterId
,ap.ParentLatitude
,ap.ParentLongitude
,ap.StaffMemberLatitude
,ap.StaffMemberLongitude
,ap.StaffVerifiedAddress
,ap.ParentVerifiedAddress
,ap.AdminVerificationDate
,ap.AdminVerifiedBy
,ap.DatePayrollReported
,ap.VerifiedFromSessionNote
,ap.hcProviderBillingCodeId
,ap.DateDoeBilled
,ap.PrincipalVerificationDate
,ap.PrincipalSignatureId
,ap.InitOccurrenceStartDate
,ap.ClockInLatitude
,ap.ClockInLongitude
,ap.ClockOutLatitude
,ap.ClockOutLongitude
,ap.ClockInAddress
,ap.ClockOutAddress
,ap.EVVStatusId
,ap.EVVRejectedReason
,ap.ToLocationLatitude
,ap.ToLocationLongitude
,ap.parentRecordInd
,ap.staffRecordInd
,ap.DPHServiceLogId
,ap.DPHProgressNoteId
,ap.HhaxTransactionID
,ap.EVVActionTakenId
,ap.dateRecovered
,ap.WorkflowHistoryId
,ap.AppointmentEvvTellusLogId
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.SandataID
,ap.UnarchivedReasonId
,ap.StatusId
,ap.WasRescheduled
,ap.UncancelReasonId
,ap.OvernightId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.clientId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0

 )t1
left join Temp_hcAppointments t2 on t1.AppointmentId = t2.AppointmentId AND t1.StartDate = t2.StartDate
WHERE t2.AppointmentId IS NULL AND t2.StartDate IS NULL
